---
title: "Richard Garnett"
---

## Richard Garnett

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1894, 1896)

### Biography

Both these articles may be by Richard Garnett (1835-1906), keeper of printed books in the British Museum. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 6th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
